mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SAO_OTP_CHARGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAO_OTP_CHARGE( USER_ID, DEVICE_ID, DEVICE_TYPE, TOKEN_ID, ISSUE_TYPE, REG_DEVICE_UUID, USER_REG_DT ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceType}, #{tokenId}, #{issueType}, #{regDeviceUuid}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, DEVICE_ID, DEVICE_TYPE, TOKEN_ID, ISSUE_TYPE, REG_DEVICE_UUID FROM SAO_OTP_CHARGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TOKEN_ID = #{tokenId} WITH UR
